ZSNAP_F01G_JOURNALENTRYITEM.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."SourceLedger" as SOURCELEDGER,
	MAIN."CompanyCode" as COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN."FiscalYear" as FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN."AccountingDocument" as ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN."LedgerGLLineItem" as LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	I_LEDGERSOURCELEDGER."Ledger" as LEDGER,
	MAIN."ChartOfAccounts" as CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN."ControllingArea" as CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN."GLAccount" as GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN."CostCenter" as COSTCENTER,
	MAIN."ProfitCenter" as PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN."FunctionalArea" as FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN."BusinessArea" as BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN."Segment" as SEGMENT,
	MAIN."PartnerCompany" as PARTNERCOMPANY,
	MAIN."DebitCreditCode" as DEBITCREDITCODE,
	
	/*@Semantics.fiscal.yearVariant: true*/
	MAIN."FiscalYearVariant" as FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	MAIN."PostingDate" as POSTINGDATE,
	MAIN."DocumentDate" as DOCUMENTDATE,
	MAIN."AccountingDocumentType" as ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN."AccountingDocumentItem" as ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN."AssignmentReference" as ASSIGNMENTREFERENCE,
	MAIN."AccountingDocumentCategory" as ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN."PostingKey" as POSTINGKEY,
	MAIN."InvoiceReference" as INVOICEREFERENCE,
	MAIN."InvoiceReferenceFiscalYear" as INVOICEREFERENCEFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN."FollowOnDocumentType" as FOLLOWONDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN."InvoiceItemReference" as INVOICEITEMREFERENCE,
	MAIN."PurchasingDocument" as PURCHASINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN."Supplier" as SUPPLIER,
	MAIN."FinancialAccountType" as FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN."SpecialGLCode" as SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN."ClearingDate" as CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN."ClearingJournalEntryFiscalYear" as CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN."ClearingJournalEntry" as CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN."NetDueDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	
	/*@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
	@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN."AmountInBalanceTransacCrcy" as AMOUNTINBALANCETRANSACCRCY,
	MAIN."BalanceTransactionCurrency" as BALANCETRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
	@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN."AmountInTransactionCurrency" as AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	MAIN."TransactionCurrency" as TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
	@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN."AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency" as AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	MAIN."CompanyCodeCurrency" as COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
	@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN."AmountInGlobalCurrency" as AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	MAIN."GlobalCurrency" as GLOBALCURRENCY
from I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA as MAIN
inner join I_LEDGERSOURCELEDGER on MAIN."SourceLedger" = I_LEDGERSOURCELEDGER."SourceLedger"
where (MAIN."FiscalPeriod" > '000')
	or (MAIN."FiscalPeriod" = '000' and (MAIN."AccountingDocumentCategory" = 'J' or MAIN."AccountingDocumentCategory" = 'L'));
ZSNAP_F01G_JOURNALENTRYITEM.@EndUserText.label: Journal Entry Item

ZSNAP_F01S_F72056.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."FiscalYearVariant" as FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	MAIN."FiscalYear" as FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN."FiscalPeriod" as FISCALPERIOD,
	MAIN."FiscalPeriodEndDate" as FISCALPERIODENDDATE,
	MAIN."FiscalYearPeriod" as FISCALYEARPERIOD
from I_FISCALPERIODFORVARIANT as MAIN
where MAIN."FiscalYearPeriod" <= :P_STOFISCALYEARPERIOD
	and MAIN."FiscalYear" >= :P_SFROMFISCALYEAR
	and MAIN."IsSpecialPeriod" = '';
ZSNAP_F01S_F72056.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F72: Balance Period Duplication

_HIERARCHY.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: GL Account Hier Level -> General Ledger Account Hierarchy

ZSNAP_F01G_122.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: GL Account Hier Level

ZSNAP_F01G_129.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" as GLACCOUNTHIERARCHY,
	LEAFNODE."ChartOfAccounts" as CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	LEAFNODE."GLAccount" as GLACCOUNT,
	
	/*@Semantics.businessDate.to: true*/
	LEAFNODE."ValidityEndDate" as VALIDITYENDDATE,
	case
		when LEAFNODE."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then LEAFNODE."ParentNode"
		when PARENT1."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT1."ParentNode"
		when PARENT2."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT2."ParentNode"
		when PARENT3."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT3."ParentNode"
		when PARENT4."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT4."ParentNode"
		when PARENT5."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT5."ParentNode"
		when PARENT6."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT6."ParentNode"
		when PARENT7."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT7."ParentNode"
		when PARENT8."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT8."ParentNode"
		when PARENT9."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT9."ParentNode"
		when PARENT10."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT10."ParentNode"
		when PARENT11."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT11."ParentNode"
		when PARENT12."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT12."ParentNode"
		when PARENT13."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT13."ParentNode"
		when PARENT14."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000002' then PARENT14."ParentNode"
		else CONCAT ('1', LEAFNODE."GLAccount")
	end as GLACCTLEVEL1,
	case
		when LEAFNODE."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then LEAFNODE."ParentNode"
		when PARENT1."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT1."ParentNode"
		when PARENT2."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT2."ParentNode"
		when PARENT3."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT3."ParentNode"
		when PARENT4."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT4."ParentNode"
		when PARENT5."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT5."ParentNode"
		when PARENT6."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT6."ParentNode"
		when PARENT7."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT7."ParentNode"
		when PARENT8."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT8."ParentNode"
		when PARENT9."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT9."ParentNode"
		when PARENT10."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT10."ParentNode"
		when PARENT11."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT11."ParentNode"
		when PARENT12."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT12."ParentNode"
		when PARENT13."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT13."ParentNode"
		when PARENT14."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000003' then PARENT14."ParentNode"
		else CONCAT ('1', LEAFNODE."GLAccount")
	end as GLACCTLEVEL2,
	case
		when LEAFNODE."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then LEAFNODE."ParentNode"
		when PARENT1."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT1."ParentNode"
		when PARENT2."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT2."ParentNode"
		when PARENT3."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT3."ParentNode"
		when PARENT4."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT4."ParentNode"
		when PARENT5."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT5."ParentNode"
		when PARENT6."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT6."ParentNode"
		when PARENT7."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT7."ParentNode"
		when PARENT8."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT8."ParentNode"
		when PARENT9."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT9."ParentNode"
		when PARENT10."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT10."ParentNode"
		when PARENT11."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT11."ParentNode"
		when PARENT12."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT12."ParentNode"
		when PARENT13."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT13."ParentNode"
		when PARENT14."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000004' then PARENT14."ParentNode"
		else CONCAT ('1', LEAFNODE."GLAccount")
	end as GLACCTLEVEL3,
	case
		when LEAFNODE."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then LEAFNODE."ParentNode"
		when PARENT1."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT1."ParentNode"
		when PARENT2."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT2."ParentNode"
		when PARENT3."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT3."ParentNode"
		when PARENT4."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT4."ParentNode"
		when PARENT5."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT5."ParentNode"
		when PARENT6."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT6."ParentNode"
		when PARENT7."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT7."ParentNode"
		when PARENT8."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT8."ParentNode"
		when PARENT9."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT9."ParentNode"
		when PARENT10."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT10."ParentNode"
		when PARENT11."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT11."ParentNode"
		when PARENT12."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT12."ParentNode"
		when PARENT13."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT13."ParentNode"
		when PARENT14."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000005' then PARENT14."ParentNode"
		else CONCAT ('1', LEAFNODE."GLAccount")
	end as GLACCTLEVEL4,
	case
		when LEAFNODE."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then LEAFNODE."ParentNode"
		when PARENT1."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT1."ParentNode"
		when PARENT2."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT2."ParentNode"
		when PARENT3."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT3."ParentNode"
		when PARENT4."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT4."ParentNode"
		when PARENT5."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT5."ParentNode"
		when PARENT6."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT6."ParentNode"
		when PARENT7."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT7."ParentNode"
		when PARENT8."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT8."ParentNode"
		when PARENT9."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT9."ParentNode"
		when PARENT10."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT10."ParentNode"
		when PARENT11."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT11."ParentNode"
		when PARENT12."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT12."ParentNode"
		when PARENT13."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT13."ParentNode"
		when PARENT14."HierarchyNodeLevel" = '000006' then PARENT14."ParentNode"
		else CONCAT ('1', LEAFNODE."GLAccount")
	end as GLACCTLEVEL5
from I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as LEAFNODE
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT1 on LEAFNODE."ParentNode" = PARENT1."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT1."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT1."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT2 on PARENT1."ParentNode" = PARENT2."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT2."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT2."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT3 on PARENT2."ParentNode" = PARENT3."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT3."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT3."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT4 on PARENT3."ParentNode" = PARENT4."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT4."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT4."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT5 on PARENT4."ParentNode" = PARENT5."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT5."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT5."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT6 on PARENT5."ParentNode" = PARENT6."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT6."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT6."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT7 on PARENT6."ParentNode" = PARENT7."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT7."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT7."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT8 on PARENT7."ParentNode" = PARENT8."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT8."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT8."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT9 on PARENT8."ParentNode" = PARENT9."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT9."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT9."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT10 on PARENT9."ParentNode" = PARENT10."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT10."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT10."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT11 on PARENT10."ParentNode" = PARENT11."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT11."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT11."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT12 on PARENT11."ParentNode" = PARENT12."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT12."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT12."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT13 on PARENT12."ParentNode" = PARENT13."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT13."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT13."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
left outer join I_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE as PARENT14 on PARENT13."ParentNode" = PARENT14."HierarchyNode" and LEAFNODE."GLAccountHierarchy" = PARENT14."GLAccountHierarchy" and PARENT14."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231'
where LEAFNODE."NodeType" = 'L'
	and LEAFNODE."ValidityEndDate" = '99991231';
ZSNAP_F01G_129.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: GL Account Hierarchy Flattening

ZSNAP_F01G_COCODELEDGERSOURCELEDGER.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."Ledger" as LEDGER,
	MAIN."CompanyCode" as COMPANYCODE,
	I_LEDGERSOURCELEDGER."SourceLedger" as SOURCELEDGER
from I_LEDGERCOMPANYCODECRCYROLES as MAIN
left outer join I_LEDGERSOURCELEDGER on MAIN."Ledger" = I_LEDGERSOURCELEDGER."Ledger";
ZSNAP_F01G_COCODELEDGERSOURCELEDGER.@EndUserText.label: Company Code Assignment of Ledgers

ZSNAP_F01G_FISCALQUARTER.@EndUserText.label: Fiscal Quarter

_FISCALYEARVARIANT.@EndUserText.label: Fiscal Year Quarter -> Fiscal Year Variant

ZSNAP_F01G_FISCALYEARQUARTER.@EndUserText.label: Fiscal Year Quarter

ZSNAP_F01G_OFFSETPURCHASEORDERCDS.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."CompanyCode" as COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN."AccountingDocument" as ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN."FiscalYear" as FISCALYEAR,
	MIN (MAIN."PurchasingDocument") as PURCHASINGDOCUMENT
from I_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM as MAIN
where MAIN."PurchasingDocument" <> ''
group by MAIN."CompanyCode",
	MAIN."AccountingDocument",
	MAIN."FiscalYear";
ZSNAP_F01G_OFFSETPURCHASEORDERCDS.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: Offset Purchase Order

ZSNAP_F01G_P_RECONACCOUNTBASIS.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."GLAccount" as RECONCILIATIONACCOUNT,
	COMPCODE."ChartOfAccounts" as CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN."ReconciliationAccountType" as RECONACCOUNTTYPE
from I_GLACCOUNTINCOMPANYCODE as MAIN
left outer join I_COMPANYCODE as COMPCODE on COMPCODE."CompanyCode" = MAIN."CompanyCode"
where MAIN."ReconciliationAccountType" <> ''
group by MAIN."GLAccount",
	COMPCODE."ChartOfAccounts",
	MAIN."ReconciliationAccountType";
ZSNAP_F01G_P_RECONACCOUNTBASIS.@EndUserText.label: P: Reconciliation Account Basis

ZSNAP_F01G_PURCHASEORDER.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: Purchase Order

ZSNAP_F01G_SINGLEROW.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	cast ('' as NVARCHAR(1)) as BLANK
from I_LANGUAGE as MAIN
where MAIN."Language" = 'E';
ZSNAP_F01G_SINGLEROW.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: Single Row Selection

ZSNAP_F01M_P_INTERCOMPANYPAIRING.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."Company" as PARTNERCOMPANY,
	MAIN."CompanyName" as COMPANYNAME,
	LPAD (LTRIM (MAIN."Company", '0'), 4, '0') as COMPANYCODE,
	LENGTH (LTRIM (MAIN."Company", '0')) as LENGTHCHECK
from I_GLOBALCOMPANY as MAIN;
ZSNAP_F01M_P_INTERCOMPANYPAIRING.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: Base Company Code Pairings

ZSNAP_F01C_PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: SNAP F01: Payment Timing Category Values
ZSNAP_F01C_PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	/*@EndUserText.label: 'Payment Timing Category'
	@ObjectModel.text.element: ['Description']
	@AnalyticsDetails.query.display: #TEXT*/
	cast ('' as NVARCHAR(1)) as PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY,
	
	/*@EndUserText.label: 'Payment Timing Category Description'
	@Semantics.text: true*/
	cast ('Not Yet Paid' as NVARCHAR(30)) as DESCRIPTION
from I_LANGUAGE as MAIN
where MAIN."Language" = 'E'
union all select
	'O' as PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY,
	cast ('Paid On-Time' as NVARCHAR(30)) as DESCRIPTION
from I_LANGUAGE as MAIN
where MAIN."Language" = 'E'
union all select
	'E' as PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY,
	cast ('Paid Early' as NVARCHAR(30)) as DESCRIPTION
from I_LANGUAGE as MAIN
where MAIN."Language" = 'E'
union all select
	'L' as PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY,
	cast ('Paid Late' as NVARCHAR(30)) as DESCRIPTION
from I_LANGUAGE as MAIN
where MAIN."Language" = 'E'
union all select
	'X' as PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY,
	cast ('Not Applicable, Check Invoices' as NVARCHAR(30)) as DESCRIPTION
from I_LANGUAGE as MAIN
where MAIN."Language" = 'E';
ZSNAP_F01C_PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F01: Payment Timing Category Values
